name: Deviled Swiss Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut round steak into serving size pieces.
2. Combine dry mustard, salt, and pepper; sprinkle over round steak and pound on both sides with a meat mallet.
3. Brown steak quickly in oil in a large frying pan.
4. Pour off drippings.
5. Drain liquid from mushrooms and add enough water to make 1/2 cup.
6. Add liquid and Worcestershire sauce to steak. Cover tightly and cook slowly for 1 1/2 hours.
7. Add mushrooms during the last 5 minutes of cooking time.
8. Remove steak to a warm serving platter and top with mushrooms.
9. Garnish with carrot curls and parsley or celery leaves.
